name_en: Blush Pink Small Size in Stock!!️
name_cn:
Blush Pink Small Size in Stock!!️
The all-new D-joy makes a strong comeback with the latest small size✔️ and the rhythm of a bestseller🔥. The bag comes with two shoulder straps for multiple carrying styles🙋🏻‍♀️, looking both beautiful and chic. Featuring a classic quilted design🥅 and paired with soft lambskin for an elegant and fashionable look🌿.
Size: 22.5*6*11.5cm
9240
